text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, a letter from a fan arrives for Rice
Shower.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her expression slips from one of happiness to one
of slight unease.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sometimes, I get this idea in my head...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
What if cheering for me brings my fans
misfortune?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I don't want to think so negatively, but...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
choice_data_list: Why don't you read the letter first?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
choice_data_list: Why don't you read the letter first?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
"I get so much courage from seeing you racing
with all your might."

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
"And when I see you smile, I always feel warm
inside."

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Racing with all my might... My smile...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...I see. I'm not doing anything special, but that
still makes them happy.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother... I want to work even harder!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister... I want to work even harder!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I want to bring happiness to the people who
support me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The clouds of doubt disappear from Rice Shower's
eyes, replaced by a blazing light!
